subject: chore(types): add @types/react-dom devDep
body:
Required by src/debug/debugRootMount.web.tsx which imports createRoot
from 'react-dom/client'. react-dom@19.1.0 ships no bundled types.
Pinned to ~19.1.0 to match the installed react-dom/react versions.
